comment.body:
it means that even if we get some upside on powell speaking, it should reverse soon towards the downside. Alma's text from the post this morning: "As long as market can hold above 5652.24 the event hedges can’t really print, and if the NFP comes out in line, event vol can be dampened abit and we can expect a temporal squeeze, but not a sustainable one. Market wants down."

but I'm not entire sure we'd get a temporal squeeze on powell speaking.
